# Fajardo Elite Dance Academy

Fajardo Elite International Dance Academy is a premier dance school located in Hackensack, New Jersey. The academy offers world-class dance instruction in various styles, including Salsa, Ballroom, Latin Hustle, Bachata, Cha Cha, and Tango.

## Core Offerings
- **Wedding Dance Lessons:** Personalized choreography and bundles for engaged couples.
- **Private Instruction:** One-on-one training for all skill levels.
- **Group Classes:** Scheduled sessions for Salsa, Bachata, and more.
- **Dance Teams:** Competitive and performance teams for Salsa and Latin Hustle.
- **Workshops:** Specialized intensive training sessions.

## Key Information
- **Website:** https://fajardoelite.com/
- **Contact:** info@fajardoelite.com
- **Booking:** Online via Square Appointments.
- **Philosophy:** Fostering a supportive, professional community for dancers of all backgrounds.

## Dance Styles
- **Salsa On1:** All levels, including team training.
- **Ballroom:** Waltz, Tango, Foxtrot, Rhumba, Cha Cha.
- **Latin Hustle:** Dynamic classes and team opportunities.
- **Social Rhythms:** Bachata, Merengue.

## Instructors
Led by Alex Fajardo and a team of professional instructors including Yu Wen and Vanessa.
